hydra-token-tracker.comment: HYDRA HEAD-8: Session token usage tracker with budget alerts

_hydra_notes.description: HYDRA HEAD-8 MCP Token Tracker configuration
_hydra_notes.usage: Add this mcpServers block to your ~/.gemini/config/mcp_config.json
features: Track input + output tokens per request
Alert when session cost exceeds ALERT_THRESHOLD_COST_USD
optimization_tips: Set COMPRESS_TRIGGER_TOKENS to 15000 for aggressive optimization
Set COMPRESS_TRIGGER_TOKENS to 30000 for balanced mode
Review SESSION_LOG_PATH daily to track trends
Use hydra audit to read the session log
